ID: US-OLV-032
Title: Confirm and undo mutations
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Accounts parity port from ops-dashboard

As a app user
I want consistent modal confirmation and undo patterns
So that destructive or risky edits are harder to make accidentally

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Shared modal components provide confirm/cancel flows for mutations.
- [ ] Undo or soft-delete patterns are available where the workspace expects them.

Notes: The shared components exist, but I did not verify every mutation surface uses them correctly.
